_comment: Default augmentation config used by the Phase 3 trainer. Edit per experiment. See PHASE2_5_AUGMENTATION_DESIGN.md §3.
_holdout_rationale: string_split is held out as a test-time adversarial probe per PHASE2_5_AUGMENTATION_DESIGN.md §3.4. It is the strongest test of pattern-matching shortcuts (defeats Bandit/Semgrep-style literal-substring detection).
